name: Stealth Elf
description: Stealth Elf is an elven ninja who is one of the playable Skylanders in the Skylanders series. She is a core member of the Skylanders and a master of stealth combat.
biography: As a small child, Stealth Elf awoke one morning inside the hollow of an old tree with no memory of how she got there. She was taken in by an unusually stealthy, ninja-like forest creature in the deep forest. Under his tutelage, she has spent the majority of her life training in the art of stealth fighting. After completing her training, she became a Skylander and set out into the world to uncover the mystery behind her origins.
personality: Stealth Elf, like all elves, adores nature. She is considered to be a guardian protector of the forests and of Skylands. She may be a highly trained ninja, but sometimes Stealth Elf is known to have a sense of a rampaging Cyclops Mammoth. She speaks her mind, whether others want to hear it or not. She can sneak her way into any enemy's territory, but can also be tactless. Like all Life Skylanders, Stealth Elf prefers to keep her feet on the ground. Stealth Elf is also known to use trickery to get out of situations she doesn't feel like doing herself, using her decoys. She also appears to be tomboyish as well.

story.content: Stealth Elf can't remember much about her family or from whence she came. But she is the only Skylander who can skewer and slice through a platoon of ne'er-do-wells before slipping away unseen. Stealth Elf's earliest memory is of waking with a start and screech, following a nightmarish dream of stampeding sheep. But when she awoke there were no woolly warriors in sight - only woodland and a complete memory blank. With a sniffle and a sigh, she picked herself up and set off in search of answers. After several days, she stumbled on a gnarled, stumpy-looking creature with the lightning moves of a ninja master. It turned out the creature was the guardian of the forest and trained in the ancient art of stealth. Sensing the young elf's skill for sneaking, the guardian immediately made her his apprentice. Sure enough, Stealth Elf was a natural and soon, ran rings around her increasingly ragged sensei. Master Eon was invited for a look, and was knocked out by her nifty ninja skills. She was made a Skylander on the spot and served not only guardian of the forests, but protector of the world.

During the struggle against Kaos and the giant Chompies, Stealth Elf stole Kaos' staff and uses its magic to grow Spyro to mega-size for him to battle the Chompies. However, Kaos stole back his staff and shrunk Stealth Elf down to the size of an ant. As revenge, the tiny elf stabbed one of her daggers into Kaos' ankle like a splinter, causing the evil Portal Master to painfully drop his staff and allowing Drill Sergeant the chance to destroy it, returning Spyro and Stealth Elf back to normal size. The Skylanders soon defeated the giant Chompies and successfully drove away Kaos from the Eternal Archive.

While searching for Kaos after his escape from the Villain Vault, Stealth Elf was with Head Rush, Fling Kong, Cali and Sharpfin at Kaos's old fortress in the Cloudbreak Islands in search of the evil Portal Master. On their way out, they were ambushed by a group of dark elite Drow Warriors lead by Count Moneybone and weren't prepared for a rift created by Kaos' Sky Eater. The three Skylanders, Sharpfin and Cali were able to escape and returned to the Academy to report what happened. After learning of the Rift Engines that may reconnect the connection between Portals, Stealth Elf, Terrafin, Jet-Vac, and Gill Grunt were assigned by Spyro to head for Know-It-All Island to discover the whereabouts of the Rift Engines.

content: Now you see me, now you don't!
You got to try better than that!
You're fast, but not fast enough!
Just keep the new name quiet.
I'll return when you least expect it...
What you can't see CAN hurt you!

trivia: In her Series 1 and Series 2 toy form, her daggers and eyes glow in the dark.
She, Chill, Deja Vu, and Roller Brawl are currently the only female Skylanders with a Legendary counterpart.
Her original catchphrase was 'Now You See Me. Now You Don't'.
It is implied that Stealth Elf had trained under numerous masters, including King Pen, Grandmaster Cami Flage, and her original master, Forester.
She is the only Skylander to be in a starter pack five times.
Her battle cry, 'Knock knock... too late!' would later be used as the catchphrase for Fist Bump.
In her prototype toy model, Stealth Elf originally had red eyes.

trailers.name: Skylanders Spyro's Adventure - Stealth Elf Trailer (Silent but Deadly)
Skylanders Spyro's Adventure - Stealth Elf Preview Trailer (Silent but Deadly)
Meet the Skylanders Series 2 Stealth Elf
Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Ninja Stealth Elf

gameplay: Being quite swift and agile, Stealth Elf able to skewer and slash swiftly at her enemies with her daggers. She can also create scarecrows of herself that wield scythes to attack other foes and can bring forth a copy of herself as a decoy to distract other enemies while she turns invisible. She can even regenerate her lost health back overtime. Her series 2 wow pow allows her to spin in a blender style with her blades, while her series 3 wow pow allows her to summon a sabertooth tiger for a short time before dealing a powerful kick to enemies.

basic.name: Blade Slash
basic.content: Slice up your enemies with a pair of sharp blades.

basic.name: Stealthier Decoy
basic.content: Disappear completely but leave behind a decoy image that enemies are drawn to.

basic_upgrades.name: Straw Pook Scarecrow
basic_upgrades.content: A Scarecrow appears in place of your decoy and distracts enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Sturdy Scarecrow
basic_upgrades.content: Scarecrows last longer and take more damage to destroy.

wow_pows.name: Knife Blender
wow_pows.content: Hold Attack 1 to unleash a mega 360-degree knife slash attack.

wow_pows.name: Surprise, Tiger!
wow_pows.content: While invisible, press Attack 3 to summon a powerful tiger ally. Also unlocks Ninja costume!

abilities.name: Elf Jitsu
abilities.content: Press 1, 1, HOLD 2 for Poison Spores. Press 1, 1, HOLD 3 for Blade Fury.

abilities.name: Elven Sunblade
abilities.content: Blade attack does even more increased damage.

abilities.name: Scare-crio Trio
abilities.content: Three Scarecrows are created in place of your decoy.

abilities.name: Scarecrow Spin Slicer
abilities.content: Scarecrows have axes and do extra damage.
